description: Highlight your professional achievements and skills with a comprehensive Curriculum Vitae or a concise Resume. This template, ideal for Human Resources use, allows you to add a profile photo, making your application more personalized and memorable. It's designed to showcase your qualifications in a clear, organized manner, enabling potential employers to quickly grasp your capabilities. Whether you're crafting a CV or a Resume with a profile photo, this template can help you present your career trajectory in the most effective way. Stand out in the competitive job market by using this template to create a visually appealing, detailed, and professionally formatted CV or Resume.
short_description: Showcase your professional achievements with a comprehensive Curriculum Vitae or Resume. Ideal for Human Resources, add a profile photo for a personalized touch. Designed for clarity and impact, this template presents your qualifications effectively for potential employers. Stand out with a visually appealing, detailed, and professionally formatted CV or Resume.

designer.description: Hello, I'm Luana, a graphic and web designer with 8+ years of experience, specializing in email and landing page design. My approach is marked by precision, proactive problem-solving, and strong collaboration. I create visually impactful designs that align with marketing strategies, including social media graphics, blog covers, and presentations. I also offer custom design services tailored to clients' unique needs.

SUSANA SMITH

ABOUT ME

 

Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of hands-on experience designing, developing, and implementing applications and solutions using a range of technologies and programming languages. Seeking to leverage broad development experience and hands-on technical expertise in a challenging role as a Full-stack Developer.

 

WORK EXPERIENCE

 

2015 - Present

AGGREGATE SINGULARITY

Full Stack Developer

 

Develop 10+ full-stack web applications to analyze and process data for different clients. Ensure applications security and ability to interact with multiple APIs and databases.

 

2018 - 2014

POWERPLAN

Full Stack Developer

Design and create a knowledge management platform on a knowledge graph, utilizing a range of technologies, including Node.js, Typescript, Dgraph, React, and Mobx.

 

2013 - 2014

CLEAN ENERGY

Developer

Developed full-stack applications across various platforms using latest industry-adopted technologies and frameworks.

Played a key role in the development, improvement, and operation of web-based software.

 

EDUCATION

 

2011 - 2014

INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

Project-focused intensive program with emphasis on Mongo, Express, React, and JavaScript (MERN) technical stack.

 

2009 - 2011

UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA
